inputs.item: Inline review comments and review threads, including Codex comments when present

actions.item: When fixing a legitimate Codex or automated review comment, add a thumbs-up reaction to the original comment after accepting it as legitimate, reply to the comment with how the issue was overcome and resolve the review thread only after the fix and validation evidence are complete.

outputs.item: Automated review comment disposition when Codex or automated reviewer comments triggered the fix

failure_states.item: Legitimate Codex or automated review comment fixed in code but left unacknowledged, unanswered or unresolved
Review thread resolved before the fix is present on the branch
